Comprehensive example
=====================

``examples/comprehensive_report.py`` showcases all element types across 6
slides with various formatting options.

.. code-block:: bash

   python examples/comprehensive_report.py

Slides included
---------------

1. **Typography Showcase** — 9 cells with ``font_name``, ``size``, ``color``,
   ``bold``, ``italic``, and panel background colors
2. **Plots Gallery** — 6 matplotlib figures in a 2×3 grid
3. **Data Tables** — zebra-striped table with engineering data
4. **Dashboard** — mix of plots, text panels, and a table
5. **Nested Layouts** — two ``ContainerElement``\ s with sub-grids
6. **Detailed Analysis** — long-form multi-column text with colored warnings

Output slides
-------------

Slide 1 — Typography Showcase:

.. image:: ../_images/comprehensive_report_p1.png
   :width: 480px
   :alt: Typography showcase

Slide 2 — Plots Gallery:

.. image:: ../_images/comprehensive_report_p2.png
   :width: 480px
   :alt: Matplotlib plots gallery

Slide 3 — Data Tables:

.. image:: ../_images/comprehensive_report_p3.png
   :width: 480px
   :alt: Data tables with zebra styling

Slide 4 — Dashboard:

.. image:: ../_images/comprehensive_report_p4.png
   :width: 480px
   :alt: Dashboard report

Slide 5 — Nested Layouts:

.. image:: ../_images/comprehensive_report_p5.png
   :width: 480px
   :alt: Nested container layouts

Slide 6 — Detailed Analysis:

.. image:: ../_images/comprehensive_report_p6.png
   :width: 480px
   :alt: Detailed analysis with colored warnings
